LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S MOTION FOR ORDER AMENDING JUDGMENT IS DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE. PLAINTIFF HAS PROVIDED INSUFFICIENT EVIDENCE FOR COURT TO "AMEND" THE JUDGMENT WITH THE NAME OF A DIFFERENT PLAINTIFF AND A DIFFERENT DEFENDANT. THE COURT DOES NOT HAVE A COURTESY COPY OF THE "ORIGINAL 'JUDGMENT PACKAGE'" THAT WAS FILED WITH THE COURT. SEE BRAHINSKY DECLARATION, PARAGRAPH 2. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE A FORM OF ORDER.) Notice Of Motion And Motion To Amend Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc
Off Calendar Oct-28-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion To Amend Judgment Nunc Pro Tunc is Granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/EHG)

Mtn For Order Amending Judgmnt
Off Calendar Sep-09-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
PLAINTIFF 21ST CENTURY INSURANCE COMPANY'S Motion For Order Amending Judgment
is Denied without prejudice. Plaintiff has provided insufficient evidence for Court to "amend" the judgment with the name of a different plaintiff and a different defendant. The Court does not have a courtesy copy of the "original 'judgment package'" that was filed with the Court. See Brahinsky Declaration, paragraph 2. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order.) Judge: Marla J. Miller, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185 =(302/MJM)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-22-2013 Off Calendar
